name: @stimulir/code-runtime-pi
description: Stimulir-flavored Pi adapter. Wraps @rivet-dev/agent-os-pi + @mariozechner/pi-coding-agent with explicit AuthStorage/ModelRegistry/SettingsManager/ResourceLoader/SessionManager wire-up (the Lemon Tasker golden standard). Exposes createPiAdapter(spec) — a single-call session factory that materializes per-session Pi config, calls createStimulirAgentSession, and returns a session you can subscribe + prompt on.
